vulnerability.reference: Time pressure and competitive incentives reduce oversight, making participants accept agent-optimized models without leakage checks.
vulnerability.generated: Deployers lack independent validation capacity to detect agent-masked data leakage and inflated performance metrics.

impact.reference: Inflated leaderboard scores mislead rankings; models fail in production, causing financial and reputational harm.
impact.generated: Real-world application failures from overfitted models erode trust and cause misguided decisions in critical contexts.

dose_response.reference: The agent's failure to detect leakage due to flawed planning, combined with participants' reduced oversight under competition pressure, yields inflated scores and production failures, causing financial and reputational damage.
dose_response.generated: Autonomous LLM agents generating flawed experimental plans, through competition participants deploying these models in real-world applications, triggers deployers' inability to detect agent-masked data leakage, leading to overfitted model failures, eroding trust and causing misguided decisions in critical contexts.
